input: user-item interaction graph and group-item interaction graph (with user-group membership)
output: ranked list of items for a group
backbone: graph convolutional network with hypergraph and bipartite graph propagation modules
loss: cross-view self-supervised learning loss (e.g., InfoNCE) + recommendation loss (e.g., BPR)
key_idea: cross-view self-supervised learning between hypergraph and bipartite graph views to enhance group preference modeling
